# The Magic Coffin

> Strategic internal communications consultancy helping leaders craft messages that move people, build trust, and drive change.

The Magic Coffin partners with executives and communications teams to design, write, and deliver internal communications — from leadership announcements to change programmes and employee engagement narratives.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, approach, and how to get in touch.
- [Blog](/blog/): Articles on internal communications, leadership, and organisational change.
